name: validate-all: /doctor includes a `validate-all` check that runs the same validator and reports per-file pass/fail
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: gtest
  authoritative_publisher: Google
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check validate-all --root "$PWD/tree" 2>out.txt && grep -E 'validate-all: ok' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
